name: Local External Cron Scheduler
description: Optional local file sync for external wake schedulers that run OpenClaw cron jobs with --due.

enabled.description: Enable local external scheduler sync. Defaults to false.

statePath.description: Path to write scheduler state JSON. Defaults to ~/.openclaw/external-cron-scheduler/jobs.json.

instanceId.description: Stable instance id included in the scheduler state. Defaults to local.

commandTemplate.description: Command template rendered for each job. Supports {jobId}.

leadTimeMs.description: Milliseconds before nextRunAtMs that the external scheduler should wake. Defaults to 0.

includeDisabled.description: Include disabled cron jobs in startup sync. Defaults to false.
